titleStmt.title: SII 24.345: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 345. (A.R. No. 22 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Records that after purchasing 3 vēli of land for 6,000 paṇam from the Sthānikas of Śrīraṅgam temple as Sēnāpatipperuvilai, Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Timmayyar, son of Śāḷuva Kamparasar Mallayar endowed the same towards offerings to the god Tiruvaraṅgachchelvar after performing the service called Ayōdhyā Rāmānujayaṉ avasaram. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1404, Śōbhakṛit, Kuṁbha, ba. 11, Thursday, Pūśam correspond to A.D. 1483, August 28, Thursday, ·96, f.d.t. ·52.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śakābtam 1000 4 100 5 ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa śobhakṛt samvat sarattu simhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Ekādaciyum bṛhaspativāramum peṟṟa pūcattunāḷ tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati śrī raṅkanārāyaṇa jiyarum Uttamanampiyum Aṉaittukkottil stāṉikarum
śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvara micurakaṇṭa kaṭṭāricāḷuva kamparacar mallaiyar kumārar timmayaṟku śrīceṉāpatipperuvilaiyāka nilavilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . perumāḷ śrīraṅkarācaṟku tiruvaraṅkac cellarRead celvarEḻuntaruḷa Amutuceytu Aruḷiṉa AyotyāRead ayoddhyā
Irāmāṉucayaṉ Avasarattukku Aṉantaramāka tammuṭaiya Avasaramāka Amutuceytaruḷum taḷikai Iraṇṭukku cakala patārttaṅkaḷum kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇi cantrātitya- varaiyum naṭattattakkatāka Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷatāsarum Appaṇṇaṉum vacam Irāmāṉucayaṉ varakkāṭṭiṉa
cakkaram ø6000kku vilai Āṉa tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷan kaṭṭaḷaiyil kāñci Oṭaikku meṟku nākappuṭaiyār toppukkuk kiḻakku puñcai meṭṭukku vaṭakku Irāmāṉucayaṉ toppukku teṟku nāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa Irācavipāṭaṉ rūpāy 3 li Inta nilam muveli—
yum Intappaṇam Āṟāyirattukkum vilaiyāvatākavum Inta nilam muveliyil tām koṇṭu tammuṭaiya Avasaramāna Iraṇṭu taḷikaiyum cantirātityavaraiyum naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum .
Digital edition of SII 24.345 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
